title: Tera-
content: Tera is a unit prefix in the metric system denoting multiplication by one trillion, or 1012 or (one trillion short scale; one billion long scale). It has the symbol T. "Tera" is derived from the Greek word, meaning "monster"; also it resembles, meaning "four" but with the middle letter removed as it is the fourth power of 1000. The unit prefix was confirmed for use in the International System of Units (SI) in 1960. Examples of its use:
